name: ExtensionServiceRequest_OrderDetail_ParameterFocus
title: R5: The context of the order details by reference (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ServiceRequest.orderDetail.parameterFocus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ServiceRequest.orderDetail.parameterFocus` 0..1 `CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceDefinition,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SupplyRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Medication,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BiologicallyDerivedProduct,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Substance)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ServiceRequest.orderDetail.parameterFocus` 0..1 `CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceDefinition,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SupplyRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Medication,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BiologicallyDerivedProduct,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Substance)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ServiceRequest.orderDetail.parameterFocus` has a context of ServiceRequest.orderDetail based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ServiceRequest`.
Element `ServiceRequest.orderDetail.parameterFocus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
